skill.name: fal-upscale
skill.description: Guides image and video upscaling workflows using fal.ai models and related quality checks.
skill.summary: Upscale image and video assets with AI enhancement guidance.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: The static network findings are source repository links in SKILL.md, not runtime network calls or data exfiltration. The weak cryptographic algorithm findings are false positives from prose that mentions AI, with no cryptographic code, scripts, commands, or prompt injection found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Source Repository URLs
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged hardcoded URLs at SKILL.md lines 4 and 22. These URLs identify the upstream source repository and do not define executable network requests, credential transfer, tracking, or remote code loading.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged lines are metadata and documentation links only. No script, command, fetch call, webhook, or secret-bearing request is present in the reviewed file.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged weak cryptographic algorithm matches at SKILL.md lines 3 and 20. The matched context is descriptive prose about AI upscaling, not cryptographic implementation or use of MD5, SHA1, DES, or RC4.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed file contains no code and no cryptographic API usage. The flagged text is ordinary skill description content.

content.user_title: Upscale Images and Videos with fal.ai
content.value_statement: Low-resolution assets can limit product, marketing, and creative work. This skill helps Claude, Codex, and Claude Code plan AI upscaling workflows with clear quality checks.
actual_capabilities: Explains when to use AI upscaling for images and videos.
Guides prompt planning for resolution enhancement workflows.
Points users to the upstream fal-upscale skill source.
Supports quality review steps for enhanced media assets.
Provides general workflow patterns for preparing source media.
limitations: Does not include executable code or API integration scripts.
Does not guarantee improved results for damaged or compressed assets.
Requires access to a compatible upscaling service outside the skill.
Provides guidance only and does not process media by itself.

use_cases.title: Improve Product Images
use_cases.description: Prepare a workflow to upscale catalog images while checking edges, labels, and texture quality.

use_cases.title: Enhance Social Video
use_cases.description: Plan a video enhancement pass for short clips before publishing to high-resolution channels.

use_cases.title: Restore Creative Assets
use_cases.description: Create a review process for older images that need clearer resolution for reuse.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Image Upscale Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me plan an AI upscaling workflow for this low-resolution image. Include source preparation, output size, and quality checks.

prompt_templates.title: Video Enhancement Checklist
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a checklist for enhancing a short video with fal.ai upscaling. Include frame quality, motion artifacts, and export review.

prompt_templates.title: Batch Asset Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a batch review process for upscaling product images. Include naming, acceptance criteria, and manual review checkpoints.

prompt_templates.title: Production Quality Workflow
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a production-ready workflow for AI upscaling mixed image and video assets. Include risk checks, fallback steps, and final approval criteria.

output_examples.input: Plan an upscale workflow for a 900 pixel product image.
output_examples.output: The assistant returns a preparation checklist, a target resolution recommendation, and a review list for text, edges, and texture artifacts.

output_examples.input: Create review criteria for an enhanced product video.
output_examples.output: The assistant provides criteria for motion smoothness, detail consistency, color stability, and final export readiness.

output_examples.input: Help compare original and upscaled creative assets.
output_examples.output: The assistant outlines a comparison process with pass, revise, and reject decisions for each asset.

best_practices: Start with the highest quality source asset available.
Review faces, text, edges, and textures before approving outputs.
Keep original files so enhanced results can be compared and rerun.
anti_patterns: Do not upscale files without checking for visual artifacts.
Do not replace original assets before review is complete.
Do not assume every low-quality source can be recovered.

faq.question: Does this skill process images directly?
faq.answer: No. It provides workflow guidance and does not include executable processing code.

faq.question: Can it be used with Claude?
faq.answer: Yes. The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: Does it require fal.ai access?
faq.answer: A compatible external upscaling service is needed to process media.

faq.question: Can it upscale video assets?
faq.answer: The skill description covers image and video resolution enhancement workflows.

faq.question: What should users review after upscaling?
faq.answer: Users should review edges, text, faces, textures, motion, and color consistency.

faq.question: Is the skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The audit found no executable code, prompt injection, or confirmed malicious behavior.
